cards.back: An optimization algorithm that updates the current estimate by moving in the direction of the negative gradient, but with a step size that increases at each iteration.
An optimization algorithm that updates the current estimate by moving in the direction of the negative gradient, but with a fixed step size at each iteration.
An optimization algorithm that uses the Hessian matrix to approximate the curvature of the function and updates the current estimate by moving in the direction of the negative Hessian.
An optimization algorithm that updates the current estimate by moving in the direction of the negative gradient, with a step size that decreases at each iteration.
An optimization algorithm that updates the current estimate by averaging the gradient of a small batch of samples and uses this average to update the estimate.
